description: Probe seat of the review funnel (#1222 Phase B): given one bundle (a code slice plus its fact sheet) already established to contain a defect, finds and describes the most serious one. Dispatched k times per bundle at temp 0.2 via the container-free single-shot chat primitive (no agent loop, no tools) — the funnel de-duplicates and hands every surviving flag to the judge for confirmation. Deliberately tool-less (the bundle is the whole record; nothing to explore) and deliberately no output_schema (free prose, not a grammar-locked flag object).
